summary: Comprehensive testing of EuroAdria content migration features: /leistungen page, team bios, contact form service dropdown, and navigation. All /leistungen page features working correctly. Contact form service dropdown and betreff prefill working. Team page extended bios NOT showing due to CMS data missing bio/usp fields.

integration_issues.issue: Extended bio and USP text not displayed - CMS data (/api/pages/team) lacks 'bio' and 'usp' fields. TeamSection.jsx has fallback defaultMembers with extended content, but CMS data takes precedence when available.

action_items: Update CMS data for /api/pages/team to include 'bio' and 'usp' fields for Holger and Milena with the extended content from TeamSection.jsx defaultMembers
critical_code_review_comments: TeamSection.jsx: CMS data overrides defaultMembers even when CMS data is incomplete. Consider merging CMS data with defaults for missing fields.

success_rate.frontend: 92% - All features pass except team extended bios (CMS data issue)

tests.test: Hero section with 'Unsere Leistungen für Ihre Zukunft'
Legal risks section with 3 risk cards on dark background
Compliance risks section with 3 risk cards
Service card 'Unverbindlich anfragen' links with betreff param

header_navigation.test: Leistungen link in header navigates to /leistungen

tests.test: Holger Kuhlmann name and title displayed
Milena Bubanja name and title displayed

test_credentials: Not needed - all pages are public
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content migration testing complete. /leistungen page fully functional with all sections. Team page extended bios require CMS update - the TeamSection.jsx has correct fallback data in defaultMembers but CMS data takes precedence. Contact form service dropdown working with 6 service options plus placeholder. Cookie consent must be dismissed by clicking 'Alle akzeptieren' before testing.

rca_of_issue.issue: Team page extended bios not showing
rca_of_issue.root_cause: CMS data at /api/pages/team returns team members without 'bio' and 'usp' fields. TeamSection.jsx line 59 uses CMS data when available: `const teamMembers = members.length > 0 ? members : defaultMembers`. Since CMS returns 2 members, it uses CMS data which lacks extended fields.
reproduction_steps: 2. Observe team member cards show only short description (quote)
3. Extended bio paragraphs and USP text are missing
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Update CMS data via admin panel or API to include 'bio' and 'usp' fields for each team member with content from TeamSection.jsx defaultMembers array
